title: Invisible GUI
description: Invisible inventory in all Minecraft interfaces for PVP games.
body:
![Invisible GUI x Vanilla GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44629083fadcae4c4325101f9d7a964c464ad952_0.webp)
![Title Invisible Gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/475f43767983d93972f2496dd1a5729d7f1561ac.png)
Invisible GUI it's a texture pack made mainly to improve PVP gameplay, where all Minecraft interfaces are transparent. But you can also use it to play normally if you like :)

**Requires 1.21.2+ for transparency features.**



<details>
<summary>Changelog</summary>

- **Version 1.1**
    - Added recipe book interface and creative mode interface, now the texture is complete.
- **Version 1.1.1**
    - Corrected compatibility info. This pack requires Minecraft 1.21.2 or newer.

</details>




### Old versions of Minecraft (1.8.9 - 1.21.1)

The translucent effect relies on the PNG alpha channel. Older versions of Minecraft (pre-1.21.2) do not process semi-transparent pixels in the UI correctly; they treat any pixel with an alpha value greater than 0 as 100% opaque. This native support for translucency was only introduced in the 1.21.2 update.

**Developed by quel13, any questions, problems or suggestions contact me!** Discord: queljkk
